"[1] [Appended, 15:28:59] [1] [15:27:50 GMT-07:00 12 Jul 2026] (805) 407-0845 has entered the chat[15:27:50 GMT-07:00 12 Jul 2026] (805) 407-0845: A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.Time of request: 10:27PM UTC. A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 35.4781 (N), Longitude -118.7316 (W).[15:27:50 GMT-07:00 12 Jul 2026] (805) 407-0845: This request is for SOMEONE ELSE.The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH.NO ONE is trapped.The person in need IS injured.The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected.Two-way text with the user is now available.[15:27:50 GMT-07:00 12 Jul 2026] (805) 407-0845: Responders may need to search an area extending at least 10 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 390 meters. Responders may need to search 10 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA!The battery level of the user's device is 61-100%. Their phone number is +18054070845.The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.[15:28:08 GMT-07:00 12 Jul 2026] Lakota DeLeon has entered the chat[15:28:08 GMT-07:00 12 Jul 2026] Lakota DeLeon: LAW ENFORCEMENT AND MEDICAL WILL BE ENRT [15:28:18 GMT-07:00 12 Jul 2026] Lakota DeLeon: DO YOU HAVE A VEH DESCRIPTION? Call initiated: 15:27:50 GMT-07:00 12 Jul 2026Phone number: (805) 407-0845"
